content: We can repurpose ICM's intrinsic reward signal to dynamically generate hard, coverage-complete benchmarks for spreading activation associative recall, where curious autonomous agents explore the associative graph to mine under-tested edge associations that standard static benchmarks miss. This creates a self-improving benchmark that adapts to the limits of current associative recall models by continuously surfacing novel recall challenges that expose weaknesses in how spreading activation propagates through weak semantic links.
source_topics: Benchmark construction for spreading activation based associative recall
trigger_topic: Benchmark construction for spreading activation based associative recall
